title: Craftable elytra/totem
description: Craftable items Datapack now you can craft an elytra and a totom
body:
with this datapack u can craft a totem out of 4 gold ingots and 1 emerald and u can craft a elytra with 7 phantom membranes and u get an accivement when u get an elytra in ur inventory and out of the accivement u can get 2-3 mace's
Very op datapack
